zh.lifeSummary: 當Marjorie Stirling於大約1325年出生在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾時，她的父親John de Stirveling of Rathoran32歲，母親Barbara Swinburne22歲。她和John Menteith, First Lord of Kerse至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1382年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marjorie Stirling于大约1325年出生在英国苏格兰艾斯爾时，她的父亲John de Stirveling of Rathoran32岁，母亲Barbara Swinburne22岁。她和John Menteith, First Lord of Kerse至少有3个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1382年之后。

nameMeanings.name: Stirling
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire): habitational name from Stirling (Stirlingshire), earlier Scots Strivilin (or similar), a name of uncertain etymology. It is recorded in the 12th century as Strevelin, and is perhaps from a river name. This surname is also common in northern Ireland (Antrim and Derry).

variants.name: Sterling
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Starling, Sterling (Old English Stærling), itself from the bird-name, whose use as a nickname may also be another source of the surname. Compare Stare 2.
German: from Middle High German sterlinc, the name of a coin, hence probably a nickname for someone who paid that amount in rent.

nameMeanings.name: Marjorie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual modern spelling of Margery . It seems to have arisen as the result of folk etymological association of the name with that of the herb marjoram ( compare Rosemary ). This word is of uncertain origin; its Middle English and Old French form was majorane, without the first -r-.

variants.name: Marjory
meanings: The usual modern spelling of Margery . It seems to have arisen as the result of folk etymological association of the name with that of the herb marjoram ( compare Rosemary ). This word is of uncertain origin; its Middle English and Old French form was majorane, without the first -r-.

en.lifeSummary: When Marjorie Stirling was born about 1325, in Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, John de Stirveling of Rathoran, was 32 and her mother, Barbara Swinburne, was 22. She had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with John Menteith, First Lord of Kerse. She died after 1382.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marjorie Stirling est née environ 1325, à Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Stirveling of Rathoran, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Barbara Swinburne, avait 22 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec John Menteith, First Lord of Kerse. Elle est décédée après 1382.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marjorie Stirling um 1325 in Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Stirveling of Rathoran 32 und ihre Mutter Barbara Swinburne 22. Sie hatte mit John Menteith, First Lord of Kerse mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1382.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marjorie Stirling è nata il circa 1325 nel Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, John de Stirveling of Rathoran, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Barbara Swinburne, aveva 22 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con John Menteith, First Lord of Kerse. Morì dopo il 1382.

ja.lifeSummary: Marjorie Stirlingが約1325年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアで生まれた時，父John de Stirveling of Rathoranは32歳，母Barbara Swinburneは22歳であった。彼女はJohn Menteith, First Lord of Kerseとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1382年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marjorie Stirling(이)가 대략 1325년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Stirveling of Rathoran(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Barbara Swinburne(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 John Menteith, First Lord of Kerse(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1382년 이후 사망했다.

Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas com John Menteith, First Lord of Kerse. Ela faleceu após 1382.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marjorie Stirling родилась около 1325 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John de Stirveling of Rathoran было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Barbara Swinburne, 22. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от John Menteith, First Lord of Kerse. Она умерла после 1382 г.
